## 📋 Pull Request Description

**What does this PR do?**
A clear and concise description of what this pull request accomplishes.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)

## 🧪 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test updates

## 🧪 Testing

**How has this been tested?**

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser testing (if applicable)
- [ ] Mobile responsive testing (if applicable)

**Test Configuration:**

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- .NET Version: [e.g. 9.0]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- Browsers tested: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 119]

## ✅ Quality Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is well-commented, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] Corresponding changes to documentation made
- [ ] Changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Tests added that prove the fix is effective or feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] All quality checks pass (`npm run quality`)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

**Before:**
[Add screenshots of the current state]

**After:**
[Add screenshots of the changes]

## 🔄 Migration Guide (for breaking changes)

If this is a breaking change, please describe the migration path for existing users:

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## 📝 Additional Notes

Add any other context about the pull request here.

## 🙋‍♂️ Reviewer Notes

**Areas of focus for reviewers:**

- [ ] Logic correctness
- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Error handling
- [ ] User experience
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Documentation accuracy
